issue_or_scope: Freeze local schemas and synthesis artifacts
source_or_tension: Both completed planners are specifications and task requires reviewed graph only
resolution_hard_gate: Permit local schema/hash/TSV validation only within 8 core-h, 4 CPU, 16 GiB, 8 h, 2 GB and zero network
owner: Program Architect and Data Provenance Reviewer
evidence_required: Direct dependency proof, upstream hashes, G01-G32 crosswalk and parser checks
resulting_graph_effect: F00 may run; no external or compute node becomes authorized

issue_or_scope: Guidance claims raw VGP TSV is committed but synchronized repository lacks it
source_or_tension: results/tier3/vgp_freeze_analysis.md versus analysis/vertebrate_scaleout_origin_inventory.md
resolution_hard_gate: Treat raw TSV as absent; reported counts remain unreproduced; require immutable one-object retrieval decision and never execute moving-main command
evidence_required: A00 exact commit/object URL, <=1 MB, license, retrieval time and rollback
resulting_graph_effect: S00 directly depends on A00

issue_or_scope: Reported 40 triple candidates and 120 composition candidates versus zero execution-eligible synchronized rows
source_or_tension: Catalog screen is necessary while exact references, native annotation, denominators and assets are unresolved
resolution_hard_gate: Use counts only as planning denominators; execution eligibility remains zero until every conjunctive row gate passes
evidence_required: Closed row ledger and exact eligibility reasons
resulting_graph_effect: No candidate is selected by headline count or generic ready flag

issue_or_scope: Three completed Tier3A prototypes versus VGP freeze target cohort
source_or_tension: Prototype telemetry exists, but guidance says two lack RefSeq annotation and one is an alternate rather than reciprocal pair
resolution_hard_gate: Keep all three record_role=calibration_only and anti-join from scientific freeze results
evidence_required: Calibration role and cohort collector rejection test
resulting_graph_effect: Calibration can inform resource model only

issue_or_scope: H2 text labels and project ID versus exact executable assets
source_or_tension: Guidance names 13 H2 labels and PRJNA489243 but lacks versioned H2/accession-level evidence
resolution_hard_gate: A label or project ID never substitutes for versioned accession, reciprocal same-individual proof, exact URL and checksums
evidence_required: Pair evidence packet per row
resulting_graph_effect: Unresolved rows stay blocked; no latest/alternate substitution

issue_or_scope: RefSeq GCF association versus requirement for original H1-native annotation
source_or_tension: A GCF may be paired with a GCA without byte-identical sequence content; newer/projected annotations may be convenient
resolution_hard_gate: Require declared original annotation plus one-to-one component sequence-set/length identity to exact H1, native status, contig bijection and CDS audit
evidence_required: Annotation linkage, sequence-set digest, contig map, GFF hash, genetic code and reconstructed CDS audit
resulting_graph_effect: Projected/lifted/mismatched/newer annotation is rejected, not repaired

issue_or_scope: Callable and queryable denominators
source_or_tension: Pair labels or variant presence can be mistaken for denominator evidence
resolution_hard_gate: Require positive original, queryable and callable H1-reference denominators for the claimed target; zero/unknown is missing and ineligible
evidence_required: Mask/target hashes, bases/genes and exclusion audit
resulting_graph_effect: No diversity/composition result without its exact denominator

issue_or_scope: Baseline Guix profile lacks IMPG while validated handoff profile contains it
source_or_tension: Origin audit warns general manifest deliberately has no IMPG; Tier3 plan preserves audited supplemental profile
resolution_hard_gate: Keep baseline and supplemental lineages separate; production requires reviewed combined SweepGA/IMPG packet and exact recorded binaries; ambient IMPG is fatal
owner: Human project owner and Reproducibility Reviewer
evidence_required: A20 exact manifests, derivations, closure, two-build SweepGA, IMPG submodules, <=30 GB store growth and smoke
resulting_graph_effect: E20 directly depends on A20; local packaging specs may proceed

issue_or_scope: SweepGA versus IMPG versus annotation versus bcftools ownership
source_or_tension: Tools could be treated as interchangeable in a permissive implementation
resolution_hard_gate: SweepGA alone maps whole H1/H2 with native 1:1 and scaffold-jump 0; IMPG alone indexes/partitions/queries/laces; original H1-native targets select regions; bcftools alone normalizes/indexes BCF/VCF
evidence_required: Rendered command fingerprints and fixture contract tests
resulting_graph_effect: D10 must fail any responsibility bypass

issue_or_scope: Existing successful jobs versus permission to reuse legacy or superseded artifacts
source_or_tension: Validated historical outputs provide calibration but may have different lineage or cohort
resolution_hard_gate: No wildcard/legacy/partial/superseded object is consumable; only signed current manifest and valid sentinel can resume
evidence_required: Supersession ledger, input anti-join and partial scan
resulting_graph_effect: Collectors reject unlisted or superseded input

issue_or_scope: Small eight-slot pilot acquisition
source_or_tension: Tier3 plan proposes a pilot but planner completion is not approval
resolution_hard_gate: Require A30 with exact eight rows/accessions/checksums/terms and <=160 GB download/input before staging
owner: Human project owner and Data Steward
evidence_required: Signed A30 exact scope, expiry, retention and rollback
resulting_graph_effect: S30 directly depends on A30

issue_or_scope: Small eight-slot pilot compute
source_or_tension: Preflight success might otherwise make Slurm executable ready
resolution_hard_gate: Require separate A31 with <=280 core-h, 96 GiB/job, 17.5 h, 150 GB scratch, 32 GB output, I/O and concurrency caps
evidence_required: Signed A31 commands, rows, Guix lineage, resources, I/O and rollback
resulting_graph_effect: X30 and X31 directly depend on A31

issue_or_scope: Pilot continuation exceeding any stated small budget
source_or_tension: Retry or underestimated row could silently cross the approved cap
resolution_hard_gate: Default pilot stops at first cap; any extra byte, core-hour, wall, memory, scratch, output, I/O or concurrency requires a distinct delta decision A32
owner: Human project owner and HPC Storage Reviewer
evidence_required: Cause analysis, exact delta, revised prediction, rollback and expiry
resulting_graph_effect: Only conditional X32 depends on A32; base pilot cannot charge overage

issue_or_scope: Tier3 assembly pilot bound 280 core-h versus demographic pilot bound 2000 core-h
source_or_tension: Upstream branches describe scientifically distinct pilots
resolution_hard_gate: Do not merge budgets or permissions; assembly pilot stays at 280 core-h and demographic methods stay separately behind A70/A71 with 2000-core-h ceiling
evidence_required: Separate row/method manifests and budget decisions
resulting_graph_effect: A31 cannot authorize D71; A71 cannot authorize X30/X31

issue_or_scope: Tier3 prediction error <=35% median and <=75% p95 versus Ne allowance of <=2x base
source_or_tension: Choosing the more permissive shared threshold would weaken Tier3 gate
resolution_hard_gate: Apply <=35% median and <=75% p95 wherever prediction errors are comparable, and additionally no demographic stage may exceed 2x base
evidence_required: Pilot telemetry and prediction-error distribution
resulting_graph_effect: Q30/Q71 fail closed when either applicable rule fails

issue_or_scope: Tier3 first-attempt technical failure <=1/8 versus demographic hard-input failure >10%
source_or_tension: Different methods and denominators could obscure failure policy
resolution_hard_gate: Assembly pilot keeps <=1/8 technical and zero unexplained; demographic pilot requires >=90% eligible completion and stops above 10% hard-input failure; all hard scientific gate violations remain zero in both
evidence_required: Closed status ledgers with failure class
resulting_graph_effect: No denominator silently shrinks

issue_or_scope: Slurm afterok versus need to retain failed array elements
source_or_tension: Release wants successful dependencies but closed-world collection must see failures
resolution_hard_gate: Use aftercorr for row stages, afterany for collectors, and afterok only after collector/evaluation proves a complete zero-unexplained-failure ledger
evidence_required: Rendered dependency graph and failure fixture
resulting_graph_effect: A failed element cannot disappear from collection

issue_or_scope: MooseFS throughput versus repeated whole-genome streaming
source_or_tension: Parallel arrays could overload storage and metadata service
resolution_hard_gate: Stage immutable inputs once to node-local scratch; batch atomic promotion; transfers <=2; pause at 80% caps and stop resumption at 95%; keep 25% quota headroom
evidence_required: Five-second telemetry, sacct/sidecar, MooseFS bytes/RPCs and quota projection
resulting_graph_effect: Launch controller steps down or stops; no gate is weakened

issue_or_scope: Reproducibility versus storage pressure
source_or_tension: Keeping every intermediate forever conflicts with quota; immediate cleanup harms audit
resolution_hard_gate: Retain provenance/final/failures/telemetry through publication plus seven years, inputs through reproducibility review, reproducible intermediates through QC plus 90 days, failed partials <=14 days; cleanup requires exact checksum ledger
owner: Human project owner and Data Steward
evidence_required: A81 or stage-specific signed retention/deletion list and rehydration test
resulting_graph_effect: No unresolved glob deletion; quota pressure causes no-go until decision

issue_or_scope: Pilot success versus permission to expand
source_or_tension: An automatic graph could treat passing evaluation as authorization
resolution_hard_gate: Independent quality, statistical/circularity, resource prediction, storage and MooseFS review only makes A50 askable
evidence_required: Closed pilot packet and all quantitative thresholds
resulting_graph_effect: No expansion executable becomes ready from R30 alone

issue_or_scope: Each expansion wave
source_or_tension: Tier3 plan says separately reviewed waves; a blanket decision would bypass future evidence
resolution_hard_gate: Every wave has a unique human A50/A5N with exact rows, downloads, compute, I/O, retention, expiry and rollback
owner: Human project owner plus review panel
evidence_required: Prior-wave closed ledger, telemetry refit and signed next-wave manifest
resulting_graph_effect: Each wave executable directly depends on its own decision

issue_or_scope: Full-catalog Slurm submission
source_or_tension: Wave approvals or synthesis could be misread as catalog permission
resolution_hard_gate: Require distinct joint A60 after full-readiness review; cumulative high envelope is a ceiling, not an allocation request
owner: Human project owner plus Scientific, HPC Storage and Reproducibility Reviewers
evidence_required: Zero retries/blockers, exact remaining rows, >=25% headroom, 100% hash and >=99.9% record QC
resulting_graph_effect: Full Tier3A/Tier3C executables directly depend on A60

issue_or_scope: Tier3A reported 40 and Tier3C reported 120 overlap
source_or_tension: Adding 40+120 would double-count shared assets and overstate catalog species
resolution_hard_gate: Model combined reported catalog as 120 species with checksum-deduplicated assets; keep modality eligibility and results separate
owner: Inventory Curator and HPC Storage Reviewer
evidence_required: Exact overlap and checksum deduplication ledger
resulting_graph_effect: Resource totals use combined resource-budget rows, not 160 species

issue_or_scope: Assembly low/base/high values versus incomplete telemetry
source_or_tension: Upstream budget includes measured timing but missing Tier3A RSS/scratch/MooseFS counters
resolution_hard_gate: Preserve 28/116.2/1482 core-h and all stated low/base/high planning bounds; label them non-allocating and require pilot telemetry/refit before wave decisions
evidence_required: Pilot five-second metrics, sacct/sidecar, file/inode and MooseFS counters
resulting_graph_effect: A50/A60 cannot approve from genome length alone

issue_or_scope: H1/H2 assembly pairs versus PSMC/MSMC2/SMC++ inputs
source_or_tension: Assembly plan has pair diversity; Ne plan has method-specific callable genotype/cohort requirements
resolution_hard_gate: Assembly status never promotes population/demographic status; require method-valid genotype/consensus or cohort, exact reference/masks, phase where needed and population proof
evidence_required: Method matrix gates and exact input ledger
resulting_graph_effect: Invalid H1/H2 conversion is rejected and retained

issue_or_scope: Ne algebraically inferred from response pi or genomic histories reused as predictors
source_or_tension: Such values can appear biologically meaningful but recode the same observations
resolution_hard_gate: Reject pi/(4mu), equivalents, response theta, and shared-site/sample PSMC/MSMC2/SMC++/SFS as primary predictors; primary overlap must equal none and unknown fails closed
evidence_required: Response dataset IDs, site/sample/mask overlap audit and validator anti-join
resulting_graph_effect: Excluded rows remain only in circularity/missingness ledger

issue_or_scope: Literature label Ne versus genuinely independent measured demography
source_or_tension: Copying a value from a paper does not prove independent samples/sites or compatible estimand
resolution_hard_gate: Audit underlying data and retain exact Ne_LD, NeV, pedigree/inbreeding/variance Ne or Nb with population/date/method/uncertainty; never generic Ne
evidence_required: Original source locator, samples/loci, overlap, taxon/population/time match
resulting_graph_effect: Only exact independent records enter separate secondary models

issue_or_scope: Native coalescent scales versus desired absolute Ne/calendar time
source_or_tension: Borrowed point mutation and generation rates can create false precision
resolution_hard_gate: Retain scaled outputs first; absolute scenarios require foreign-keyed per-generation mu and generation-time distributions, ploidy/heredity, recombination treatment, transfer distance and propagated joint uncertainty
evidence_required: Formula/convention and calibration scenario records with draws
resulting_graph_effect: Missing calibration yields scaled-only output, never an imputed absolute point

issue_or_scope: Bulk or very large demographic acquisition
source_or_tension: Metadata preflight may expose raw-read or population assets exceeding normal storage
resolution_hard_gate: Require A70 for exact URLs/accessions/terms/bytes, <=2 TiB hard pilot acquisition/scratch ceiling, bandwidth, retention and rollback
owner: Human project owner, Data Steward and HPC Storage Reviewer
evidence_required: Provider sizes/checksums, source terms and low/base/high I/O model
resulting_graph_effect: S70 directly depends on A70; A60 has no authority

issue_or_scope: Expensive demographic inference
source_or_tension: Successful staging could otherwise make PSMC/MSMC2/SMC++/SFS/BPP ready
resolution_hard_gate: Require separate A71 for exact methods/species/profiles and <=2000 core-h, 256 GiB/job, 2 TiB scratch, 300 GB persistent and I/O/concurrency caps
owner: Human project owner plus Demographic, Circularity and HPC Reviewers
evidence_required: Validated inputs, synthetic truth, power/resource model and signed command manifest
resulting_graph_effect: D71 directly depends on A71; acquisition approval alone is insufficient

issue_or_scope: Demographic low/base/high demand versus zero frozen inputs and no telemetry
source_or_tension: Task asks totals but upstream strategy supplies only method ranges and hard pilot caps
resolution_hard_gate: Publish provisional 300/1000/2000 core-h partitions with explicit amplification assumptions; require Phase-7 replacement from provider sizes and pilot telemetry; do not estimate catalog-scale demographic total
owner: Demographic Methods and HPC Storage Reviewers
evidence_required: Exact method mix, provider bytes, synthetic benchmark and pilot telemetry before any scale-out
resulting_graph_effect: Only bounded pilot can be considered; demographic catalog program is absent

issue_or_scope: Species, population and assembly units could be pooled
source_or_tension: Scaleout plan uses species unit while Ne plan permits multiple populations nested within species
resolution_hard_gate: Keep assembly and population responses separate; nest populations in species with within-species covariance; exact TaxId/tree tip only; no fuzzy joins
evidence_required: Frozen tree ensemble, population crosswalk and unit-labeled response rows
resulting_graph_effect: Final models consume separate strata and join only in tier-labeled synthesis

issue_or_scope: Unavailable/failed rows versus pressure to maximize sample size
source_or_tension: Both plans require closed-world ledgers and prohibit zero substitution
resolution_hard_gate: No mean/zero imputation in primary evidence; distinguish not measured, inaccessible, failed QC/resource, structural exclusion, unmatched taxon and circular exclusion; report selection by clade/traits without using pi for inclusion
evidence_required: Exact set equality and missingness/selection audit
resulting_graph_effect: Collectors and release fail on any dropped row

issue_or_scope: Final statistical fit
source_or_tension: Frozen inputs and passing branches are not permission to run or publish
resolution_hard_gate: Require A80 for exact tables/formulas/resources and A81 separately for release/cleanup
owner: Human project owner and Independent Results Reviewer
evidence_required: Non-circular design matrix, tree/model freeze, artifact hashes, <=16 CPU/64 GiB/48 h/100 GB and release review
resulting_graph_effect: X80 depends on A80; release depends on A81

issue_or_scope: Full demographic catalog or unbounded method expansion
source_or_tension: No frozen eligible vertebrate inputs, method mix, provider bytes, telemetry or defensible total exists
resolution_hard_gate: Do not create a ready scale-out node; retain smaller descriptive methods if valid and propose a new reviewed program only after pilot
evidence_required: Reviewed Q71 packet, measured resource model and new explicit graph
resulting_graph_effect: No default path beyond bounded demographic pilot

issue_or_scope: Whether synthesis launched jobs, inference or downloads
source_or_tension: Task explicitly prohibits Slurm, demographic inference and bulk downloads
resolution_hard_gate: Assert and manually verify no sbatch/srun/job IDs, retrieval/staging manifests, biological assets or inference outputs were created; generated commands remain inert
evidence_required: Git diff, process/scheduler-safe checks, artifact list and completion log
resulting_graph_effect: Full execution stays blocked at A60, A70 and A71
